all_rules.name: All Same Suit
all_rules.description: All cards have the same suit

all_rules.name: All Same Color
all_rules.description: All cards have the same color (red or black)

all_rules.name: All Same Parity
all_rules.description: All cards have the same rank parity (all odd or all even)

all_rules.name: All Same Pointy/Round
all_rules.description: All cards are pointy (spades/diamonds) or all are round (hearts/clubs)

all_rules.name: All Same SH/DC
all_rules.description: All cards are SH (spades/hearts) or all are DC (diamonds/clubs)

all_rules.description: First card has odd rank

all_rules.description: First card has even rank

all_rules.description: Sum of all rank values is even

all_rules.description: Sum of all rank values is odd

all_rules.description: Hand contains at least one clubs

all_rules.description: Hand contains at least one spades

all_rules.description: Hand contains no clubss

all_rules.description: Hand contains no diamondss

all_rules.description: Hand contains no spadess

all_rules.description: Hand contains no red cards

all_rules.description: The middle card is red

all_rules.description: The middle card is black

all_rules.name: Sum of Ranks Divisible by 3
all_rules.description: Sum of all rank values is divisible by 3

all_rules.description: Sum of all rank values is divisible by 4

all_rules.name: Sum of Ranks Divisible by 5
all_rules.description: Sum of all rank values is divisible by 5

all_rules.name: All Low Cards
all_rules.description: All cards have rank 7 or lower

all_rules.name: All High Cards
all_rules.description: All cards have rank 8 or higher

all_rules.name: Has Low Card
all_rules.description: Hand contains at least one card with rank 5 or lower

all_rules.name: Has High Card
all_rules.description: Hand contains at least one card with rank 10 or higher

all_rules.name: First and Last Same Suit
all_rules.description: First and last cards have the same suit

all_rules.name: First and Last Same Color
all_rules.description: First and last cards have the same color

all_rules.name: First and Last Same Rank
all_rules.description: First and last cards have the same rank

all_rules.name: First and Last Same Parity
all_rules.description: First and last cards have the same rank parity

all_rules.name: First and Last Different Suits
all_rules.description: First and last cards have different suits

all_rules.name: First and Last Different Colors
all_rules.description: First and last cards have different colors

all_rules.name: First Rank Greater Than Last
all_rules.description: First card has higher rank than last card

all_rules.name: First Rank Less Than Last
all_rules.description: First card has lower rank than last card

all_rules.name: Halves Uniform Color Equal
all_rules.description: Both halves are uniformly colored, or both are not

all_rules.name: Halves Uniform Suit Equal
all_rules.description: Both halves have uniform suit, or both don't

all_rules.name: Halves Same Suit Set
all_rules.description: Both halves contain the same set of suits

all_rules.name: Halves Same Color Set
all_rules.description: Both halves contain the same set of colors

all_rules.name: Left Half Sum Greater
all_rules.description: Sum of ranks in left half is greater than right half

all_rules.name: Halves Equal Sum
all_rules.description: Sum of ranks in left half equals right half

all_rules.name: All Adjacent Same Color
all_rules.description: All adjacent cards have the same color

all_rules.name: All Adjacent Different Colors
all_rules.description: All adjacent cards have different colors (alternating)

all_rules.name: Position 0 and 1 Same Suit
all_rules.description: Cards at positions 0 and 1 have the same suit

all_rules.name: Position 0 and 2 Same Suit
all_rules.description: Cards at positions 0 and 2 have the same suit

all_rules.name: Position 1 and 2 Same Suit
all_rules.description: Cards at positions 1 and 2 have the same suit

all_rules.name: Position 1 and 3 Same Suit
all_rules.description: Cards at positions 1 and 3 have the same suit

all_rules.name: Position 2 and 3 Same Suit
all_rules.description: Cards at positions 2 and 3 have the same suit

all_rules.name: Position 2 and 4 Same Suit
all_rules.description: Cards at positions 2 and 4 have the same suit

all_rules.description: Hand contains exactly 1 different suit

all_rules.description: Hand contains exactly 2 different suits

all_rules.description: Hand contains exactly 3 different suits

all_rules.description: Hand contains exactly 4 different suits

all_rules.description: Hand contains at least 3 different suits

all_rules.description: Hand contains at least 4 different suits

all_rules.description: Hand contains exactly 1 black card

all_rules.name: More Red Than Black
all_rules.description: More red cards than black cards

all_rules.name: More Black Than Red
all_rules.description: More black cards than red cards

all_rules.name: Equal Red and Black
all_rules.description: Equal number of red and black cards

all_rules.name: Majority Same Suit
all_rules.description: More than half the cards share the same suit

all_rules.name: Majority Same Color
all_rules.description: More than half the cards share the same color

all_rules.name: Exactly 1 Odd Rank
all_rules.description: Exactly 1 card with odd rank

all_rules.name: Exactly 2 Odd Ranks
all_rules.description: Exactly 2 cards with odd rank

all_rules.name: Exactly 3 Odd Ranks
all_rules.description: Exactly 3 cards with odd rank

all_rules.name: Exactly 1 Even Rank
all_rules.description: Exactly 1 card with even rank

all_rules.name: Exactly 2 Even Ranks
all_rules.description: Exactly 2 cards with even rank

all_rules.name: Exactly 3 Even Ranks
all_rules.description: Exactly 3 cards with even rank

all_rules.name: Sorted by Rank (Non-decreasing)
all_rules.description: Ranks are in non-decreasing order left to right

all_rules.name: Sorted by Rank (Strictly Increasing)
all_rules.description: Ranks are in strictly increasing order left to right

all_rules.name: Sorted by Rank (Non-increasing)
all_rules.description: Ranks are in non-increasing order left to right

all_rules.name: Alternating Colors
all_rules.description: Colors alternate (red-black-red-black... or black-red-black-red...)

all_rules.name: Alternating Parities
all_rules.description: Rank parities alternate (odd-even-odd-even... or even-odd-even-odd...)

all_rules.name: Has Pair (Same Rank)
all_rules.description: At least two cards share the same rank

all_rules.name: Has Triple (Three of a Kind)
all_rules.description: At least three cards share the same rank

all_rules.name: Has Adjacent Suit Pair
all_rules.description: At least two adjacent cards share the same suit

all_rules.name: Suits Palindrome
all_rules.description: Suit sequence reads the same forwards and backwards

all_rules.name: Colors Palindrome
all_rules.description: Color sequence reads the same forwards and backwards

all_rules.name: Ranks Palindrome
all_rules.description: Rank sequence reads the same forwards and backwards

all_rules.name: Parities Palindrome
all_rules.description: Parity sequence reads the same forwards and backwards

all_rules.name: Halves Copy Suits
all_rules.description: Left and right halves have the same suit sequence

all_rules.name: Halves Copy Colors
all_rules.description: Left and right halves have the same color sequence

all_rules.name: Halves Copy Ranks
all_rules.description: Left and right halves have the same rank sequence

all_rules.name: Has Run of 3
all_rules.description: Contains at least 3 consecutive ranks (ignoring position)

all_rules.name: Has Run of 4
all_rules.description: Contains at least 4 consecutive ranks (ignoring position)

all_rules.name: Adjacent Rank Gap <= 2
all_rules.description: All adjacent cards differ by at most 2 in rank

all_rules.name: Adjacent Rank Gap <= 3
all_rules.description: All adjacent cards differ by at most 3 in rank

all_rules.name: Adjacent Same Rank or Suit
all_rules.description: All adjacent cards share either rank or suit

all_rules.name: V-Shape Ranks
all_rules.description: Ranks descend to middle then ascend (V shape)

all_rules.name: Inverted V-Shape Ranks
all_rules.description: Ranks ascend to middle then descend (inverted V)

all_rules.name: Period-2 Colors
all_rules.description: Colors repeat with period 2 (ABABAB...)

all_rules.name: Period-2 Suits
all_rules.description: Suits repeat with period 2 (ABABAB...)

all_rules.name: Skip-1 Same Suit
all_rules.description: Cards at positions i and i+2 have same suit

all_rules.name: Skip-1 Same Color
all_rules.description: Cards at positions i and i+2 have same color

all_rules.name: Rank Spread >= 8
all_rules.description: Difference between highest and lowest rank is at least 8

all_rules.name: Rank Spread <= 5
all_rules.description: Difference between highest and lowest rank is at most 5

all_rules.name: Monotonic Ranks
all_rules.description: Ranks are either non-decreasing or non-increasing

all_rules.name: All Same Color AND Sorted
all_rules.description: All cards same color AND ranks are sorted

all_rules.name: Has Pair AND Alternating Colors
all_rules.description: Has a pair AND colors alternate

all_rules.name: First Red AND Last Black
all_rules.description: First card is red AND last card is black

all_rules.name: First Black AND Last Red
all_rules.description: First card is black AND last card is red

all_rules.name: Exactly 2 Suits AND Has Pair
all_rules.description: Exactly 2 suits AND has at least one pair

all_rules.name: Sum Even AND First Red
all_rules.description: Sum of ranks is even AND first card is red

all_rules.name: Halves Same Colors AND Sorted
all_rules.description: Both halves have same color set AND ranks are sorted

all_rules.name: All Same Suit OR All Same Color
all_rules.description: All cards same suit OR all cards same color

all_rules.name: Has Pair OR Sorted
all_rules.description: Has a pair OR ranks are sorted

all_rules.name: First Red OR Last Red
all_rules.description: First card is red OR last card is red

all_rules.name: Palindrome Suits OR Palindrome Colors
all_rules.description: Suits form palindrome OR colors form palindrome

all_rules.name: Sum Even OR Has Spade
all_rules.description: Sum of ranks is even OR has at least one spade

all_rules.name: If First Red Then Last Black
all_rules.description: If first card is red, then last card must be black

all_rules.name: If Has Spade Then Has Heart
all_rules.description: If hand has a spade, it must also have a heart

all_rules.name: If Sorted Then Has Pair
all_rules.description: If ranks are sorted, then must have at least one pair

all_rules.name: If Uniform Color Then Not Sorted
all_rules.description: If all cards same color, then ranks must not be sorted

all_rules.name: Opposite Terminal Colors
all_rules.description: First and last cards have opposite colors

all_rules.name: Same Color AND (Sorted OR Pair)
all_rules.description: All same color AND (sorted OR has pair)

all_rules.name: Has Both of a Color Pair
all_rules.description: Has (spade AND heart) OR (diamond AND club)

all_rules.name: More Red AND First Red
all_rules.description: More red cards than black AND first card is red

all_rules.name: Same Suit XOR Same Color
all_rules.description: All same suit XOR all same color (exactly one, not both)

all_rules.name: Sorted XOR Has Pair
all_rules.description: Sorted XOR has pair (exactly one, not both)

all_rules.name: Alternating Colors AND First Spade
all_rules.description: Colors alternate AND first card is a spade

all_rules.name: Has Run of 3 AND Uniform Color
all_rules.description: Contains 3 consecutive ranks AND all cards same color

all_rules.name: Palindrome Colors AND Has Heart
all_rules.description: Color sequence is palindrome AND has at least one heart

all_rules.name: More Black AND Last Black
all_rules.description: More black cards than red AND last card is black

all_rules.name: At Least 3 Suits AND Sorted
all_rules.description: At least 3 different suits AND ranks are sorted

all_rules.name: Has Triple OR All Same Color
all_rules.description: Has three of a kind OR all cards same color

all_rules.name: First Black OR Last Black
all_rules.description: First card is black OR last card is black

all_rules.name: Sum Even OR Alternating Colors
all_rules.description: Sum of ranks is even OR colors alternate

all_rules.name: More Suit Variety OR Has Pair
all_rules.description: More unique suits than colors OR has a pair

all_rules.name: If Uniform Color Then Sum Even
all_rules.description: If all cards same color, then sum of ranks must be even

all_rules.name: If Has Pair Then Not Palindrome Suits
all_rules.description: If hand has a pair, then suits must not form palindrome

all_rules.name: If First Heart Then Last Diamond
all_rules.description: If first card is heart, then last card must be diamond

all_rules.name: If More Red Then First Red
all_rules.description: If more red than black, then first card must be red

all_rules.name: Same Color AND Sorted AND Pair
all_rules.description: All same color AND sorted AND has at least one pair

all_rules.name: First Red AND Last Black AND Has Spade
all_rules.description: First is red AND last is black AND has at least one spade

all_rules.name: Not All Same Suit
all_rules.description: Not all cards have the same suit (at least 2 different suits)

all_rules.name: Not Sorted
all_rules.description: Ranks are NOT in non-decreasing order

all_rules.name: Not Palindrome Colors
all_rules.description: Color sequence is NOT a palindrome

all_rules.name: Same Suit IFF Same Color
all_rules.description: All same suit if and only if all same color

all_rules.name: Has Pair IFF <= 5 Unique Ranks
all_rules.description: Has pair if and only if at most 5 unique ranks

all_rules.name: Neither Same Suit Nor Same Color
all_rules.description: Not all same suit AND not all same color

all_rules.name: Has Heart AND Has Club
all_rules.description: Has at least one heart AND at least one club

all_rules.name: Has Diamond AND Has Spade
all_rules.description: Has at least one diamond AND at least one spade

all_rules.name: All Four Suits Present
all_rules.description: Hand contains cards from all four suits

all_rules.name: Exactly One Suit Missing
all_rules.description: Exactly three suits are present (one is missing)

all_rules.name: All Even OR All Odd Ranks
all_rules.description: All cards have even ranks OR all cards have odd ranks

all_rules.name: First Pair AND Last Pair Same Suit
all_rules.description: First two cards share suit AND last two cards share suit

all_rules.name: First Pair OR Last Pair Same Color
all_rules.description: First two cards share color OR last two cards share color

all_rules.name: No Pair AND Not Sorted
all_rules.description: No pairs AND ranks are not sorted

all_rules.name: Sum Div 3 AND Has Heart
all_rules.description: Sum of ranks divisible by 3 AND has at least one heart

all_rules.name: Halves Copy Colors AND First Black
all_rules.description: Left and right halves have same color sequence AND first card is black
